data.name: CouldNotLoadSettings
data.value: Could not load TinyWall settings from the service.

data.name: TinyWallLocked
data.value: TinyWall is locked. Unlock it before changing application exceptions.

data.name: CouldNotContactService
data.value: Could not contact the TinyWall service.

data.name: CouldNotUpdateExceptions
data.value: The TinyWall service could not update application exceptions.

data.name: ExistingExceptionPromptFormat
data.value: This {0} was added before as {1}. Apply the new {2} requirement?

data.name: CannotApplyUnnamedItemFormat
data.value: Cannot {0} this item because its name is unavailable.

data.name: CannotApplyServiceWithoutPathFormat
data.value: Cannot {0} this service because its executable path is unavailable.

data.name: CannotApplyPackageWithoutSidFormat
data.value: Cannot {0} this package because its package SID is unavailable.

data.name: CannotApplyProcessWithoutPathFormat
data.value: Cannot {0} this process because its executable path is unavailable.
